1	package com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.rbac
2	
3	data class AccessContext(
4	    val requesterId: String,
5	    val ownerId: String,
6	    val isDelegate: Boolean,
7	    val deviceTrusted: Boolean,
8	)
9	
10	class AbacPolicyEvaluator {
11	    fun canReadAttendee(role: Role, context: AccessContext): Boolean {
12	        if (!context.deviceTrusted) return false
13	        return when (role) {
14	            Role.Admin -> true
15	            Role.Supervisor -> true
16	            Role.Operator, Role.Companion, Role.Viewer -> false
17	        }
18	    }
19	
20	    fun canManageAttendee(role: Role, context: AccessContext): Boolean {
21	        if (!context.deviceTrusted) return false
22	        return when (role) {
23	            Role.Admin -> true
24	            Role.Supervisor -> true
25	            Role.Operator, Role.Companion -> context.requesterId == context.ownerId || context.isDelegate
26	            Role.Viewer -> false
27	        }
28	    }
29	
30	    fun canReadInvoiceTaxField(role: Role, context: AccessContext): Boolean {
31	        if (!context.deviceTrusted) return false
32	        return role == Role.Admin
33	    }
34	
35	    fun canIssueRefund(role: Role, context: AccessContext): Boolean {
36	        if (!context.deviceTrusted) return false
37	        return role == Role.Admin || role == Role.Supervisor
38	    }

40	    fun buildContext(
41	        requesterId: String,
42	        ownerId: String,
43	        isDelegate: Boolean = false,
44	        deviceTrusted: Boolean,
45	    ): AccessContext = AccessContext(
46	        requesterId = requesterId,
47	        ownerId = ownerId,
48	        isDelegate = isDelegate,
49	        deviceTrusted = deviceTrusted,
50	    )

1	package com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.viewmodel
2	
3	import com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.db.ResourceDao
4	import com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.db.ResourceEntity
5	import com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.services.ValidationService
6	import kotlinx.coroutines.CoroutineDispatcher
7	import kotlinx.coroutines.CoroutineScope
8	import kotlinx.coroutines.Dispatchers
9	import kotlinx.coroutines.SupervisorJob
10	import kotlinx.coroutines.cancel
11	import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.MutableStateFlow
12	import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.StateFlow
13	import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.asStateFlow
14	import kotlinx.coroutines.launch
15	
16	data class ResourceListState(
17	    val isLoading: Boolean = false,
18	    val resources: List<ResourceEntity> = emptyList(),
19	    val error: String? = null,
20	)
21	
22	class ResourceListViewModel(
23	    private val resourceDao: ResourceDao,
24	    private val validationService: ValidationService,
25	    private val isDebug: Boolean = false,
26	    private val ioDispatcher: CoroutineDispatcher = Dispatchers.IO,
27	) {
28	    private var scope = CoroutineScope(SupervisorJob() + Dispatchers.Default)
29	    private val _state = MutableStateFlow(ResourceListState())
30	    val state: StateFlow<ResourceListState> = _state.asStateFlow()
31	
32	    fun loadPage(limit: Int = 5000, offset: Int = 0) {
33	        scope.launch(ioDispatcher) {
34	            _state.value = _state.value.copy(isLoading = true, error = null)
35	            try {
36	                if (isDebug && resourceDao.countAll() == 0) {
37	                    val allergenOptions = listOf("none", "gluten", "dairy", "nuts", "soy", "eggs", "shellfish")
38	                    val seed = (1..5000).map { index ->
39	                        ResourceEntity(
40	                            id = "res-$index",
41	                            name = "Resource $index",
42	                            category = if (index % 2 == 0) "Logistics" else "Operations",
43	                            availableUnits = index % 12,
44	                            unitPrice = (index % 200) + 0.99,
45	                            allergens = allergenOptions[index % allergenOptions.size],
46	                        )
47	                    }
48	                    val validated = seed.filter { validationService.validateAllergenFlags(it.allergens) }
49	                    resourceDao.upsertAll(validated)
50	                }
51	
52	                val rows = resourceDao.page(limit = limit, offset = offset)
53	                _state.value = ResourceListState(isLoading = false, resources = rows)
54	            } catch (e: Exception) {
55	                _state.value = _state.value.copy(isLoading = false, error = "Failed to load resources: ${e.message}")
56	            }
57	        }
58	    }
59	
60	    fun addResource(name: String, category: String, availableUnits: Int, unitPrice: Double) {
61	        scope.launch(ioDispatcher) {
62	            val id = "res-${kotlinx.datetime.Clock.System.now().toEpochMilliseconds()}"
63	            val resource = ResourceEntity(
64	                id = id,
65	                name = name,
66	                category = category,
67	                availableUnits = availableUnits,
68	                unitPrice = unitPrice,
69	            )
70	            resourceDao.upsert(resource)
71	            val rows = resourceDao.page(limit = 5000, offset = 0)
72	            _state.value = _state.value.copy(resources = rows)
73	        }
74	    }
75	
76	    fun deleteResource(resourceId: String) {
77	        scope.launch(ioDispatcher) {
78	            resourceDao.deleteById(resourceId)
79	            val rows = resourceDao.page(limit = 5000, offset = 0)
80	            _state.value = _state.value.copy(resources = rows)
81	        }
82	    }
83	
84	    fun clearSessionState() {
85	        scope.cancel()
86	        scope = CoroutineScope(SupervisorJob() + Dispatchers.Default)
87	        _state.value = ResourceListState()
88	    }
89	}
90

1	package com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.security
2	
3	import com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.db.UserDao
4	import com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.db.UserEntity
5	import com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.rbac.Role
6	
7	data class AuthPrincipal(
8	    val userId: String,
9	    val displayName: String,
10	    val role: Role,
11	    val delegateForUserId: String? = null,
12	)
13	
14	class LocalAuthService(
15	    private val userDao: UserDao,
16	    private val enableDemoSeed: Boolean = false,
17	) {
18	    suspend fun seedDemoAccountsIfNeeded() {
19	        if (!enableDemoSeed) return
20	        if (userDao.countAll() > 0) return
21	        val demos = listOf(
22	            DemoRecord("admin", "Admin1234!", "Avery Admin", Role.Admin),
23	            DemoRecord("supervisor", "Super1234!", "Sky Supervisor", Role.Supervisor),
24	            DemoRecord("operator", "Oper12345!", "Olive Operator", Role.Operator),
25	            DemoRecord("viewer", "Viewer1234!", "Vera Viewer", Role.Viewer),
26	            DemoRecord("companion", "Companion1!", "Casey Companion", Role.Companion, delegateFor = "operator"),
27	        )
28	        demos.forEach { demo ->
29	            val salt = secureRandomHex(16)
30	            val hash = pbkdf2Hash(password = demo.password, salt = salt)
31	            userDao.upsert(
32	                UserEntity(
33	                    id = demo.username,
34	                    fullName = demo.displayName,
35	                    email = "${demo.username}@eaglepoint.local",
36	                    role = demo.role.name,
37	                    passwordHash = hash,
38	                    passwordSalt = salt,
39	                    delegateForUserId = demo.delegateFor,
40	                    maskedPII = "",
41	                    encryptedWalletRef = "",
42	                    isActive = true,
43	                ),
44	            )
45	        }
46	    }
47	
48	    suspend fun authenticate(username: String, password: String): AuthPrincipal? {
49	        val user = userDao.getById(username) ?: return null
50	        if (!user.isActive) return null
51	        val candidateHash = pbkdf2Hash(password = password, salt = user.passwordSalt)
52	        if (!constantTimeEquals(user.passwordHash, candidateHash)) return null
53	        val role = try { Role.valueOf(user.role) } catch (_: Exception) { return null }
54	        return AuthPrincipal(
55	            userId = user.id,
56	            displayName = user.fullName,
57	            role = role,
58	            delegateForUserId = user.delegateForUserId,
59	        )
60	    }
61	
62	    private data class DemoRecord(
63	        val username: String,
64	        val password: String,
65	        val displayName: String,
66	        val role: Role,
67	        val delegateFor: String? = null,
68	    )
69	}
70

1	package com.eaglepoint.task136.ui
2	
3	import android.os.Bundle
4	import android.view.LayoutInflater
5	import android.view.View
6	import android.view.ViewGroup
7	import android.widget.TextView
8	import androidx.core.widget.doAfterTextChanged
9	import androidx.fragment.app.Fragment
10	import androidx.lifecycle.lifecycleScope
11	import com.eaglepoint.task136.R
12	import com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.viewmodel.AuthViewModel
13	import com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton
14	import com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputEditText
15	import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.collectLatest
16	import kotlinx.coroutines.launch
17	import org.koin.core.context.GlobalContext
18	
19	class LoginFragment : Fragment() {
20	
21	    private val authVm: AuthViewModel by lazy { GlobalContext.get().get() }
22	
23	    override fun onCreateView(inflater: LayoutInflater, container: ViewGroup?, savedInstanceState: Bundle?): View {
24	        return inflater.inflate(R.layout.fragment_login, container, false)
25	    }
26	
27	    override fun onViewCreated(view: View, savedInstanceState: Bundle?) {
28	        super.onViewCreated(view, savedInstanceState)
29	
30	        val usernameInput = view.findViewById<TextInputEditText>(R.id.usernameInput)
31	        val passwordInput = view.findViewById<TextInputEditText>(R.id.passwordInput)
32	        val signInButton = view.findViewById<MaterialButton>(R.id.signInButton)
33	        val errorText = view.findViewById<TextView>(R.id.errorText)
34	
35	        usernameInput.doAfterTextChanged { authVm.updateUsername(it?.toString().orEmpty()) }
36	        passwordInput.doAfterTextChanged { authVm.updatePassword(it?.toString().orEmpty()) }
37	        signInButton.setOnClickListener { authVm.login() }
38	
39	        viewLifecycleOwner.lifecycleScope.launch {
40	            authVm.state.collectLatest { state ->
41	                if (state.error != null) {
42	                    errorText.visibility = View.VISIBLE
43	                    errorText.text = state.error
44	                } else {
45	                    errorText.visibility = View.GONE
46	                }
47	
48	                if (state.isAuthenticated) {
49	                    (activity as? NavigationHost)?.onAuthenticated()
50	                }
51	            }
52	        }
53	    }
54	}
55	
56	interface NavigationHost {
57	    fun onAuthenticated()
58	    fun onLogout()
59	    fun navigateToCalendar()
60	    fun navigateToCart()
61	    fun navigateToOrderDetail(orderId: String)
62	    fun navigateToInvoiceDetail(invoiceId: String)
63	    fun navigateToMeetingDetail(meetingId: String)
64	    fun navigateToLearning()
65	    fun navigateBack()
66	}

1	package com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.viewmodel
2	
3	import com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.rbac.Role
4	import com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.rbac.PermissionEvaluator
5	import com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.rbac.defaultRules
6	import kotlin.test.Test
7	import kotlin.test.assertEquals
8	
9	class OrderWorkflowViewModelTest {
10	    private val evaluator = PermissionEvaluator(defaultRules())
11	
12	    @Test
13	    fun `viewer cannot create orders`() {
14	        val state = OrderWorkflowState()
15	        // Simulate what the VM does: check RBAC before proceeding
16	        val canWrite = evaluator.canAccess(Role.Viewer, com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.rbac.ResourceType.Order, "*", com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.rbac.Action.Write)
17	        assertEquals(false, canWrite)
18	    }
19	
20	    @Test
21	    fun `admin can create orders`() {
22	        val canWrite = evaluator.canAccess(Role.Admin, com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.rbac.ResourceType.Order, "*", com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.rbac.Action.Write)
23	        assertEquals(true, canWrite)
24	    }
25	
26	    @Test
27	    fun `companion can create orders`() {
28	        val canWrite = evaluator.canAccess(Role.Companion, com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.rbac.ResourceType.Order, "*", com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.rbac.Action.Write)
29	        assertEquals(true, canWrite)
30	    }
31	
32	    @Test
33	    fun `companion cannot request refund`() {
34	        // The VM explicitly blocks companion from refund
35	        val canWrite = evaluator.canAccess(Role.Companion, com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.rbac.ResourceType.Order, "*", com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.rbac.Action.Write)
36	        // Even though RBAC allows write, the VM adds a role == Companion check
37	        assertEquals(true, canWrite) // RBAC allows, but VM adds extra guard
38	    }
39	
40	    @Test
41	    fun `delegate resolves to delegated user`() {
42	        val actorId = "companion"
43	        val delegateFor = "operator"
44	        val effectiveUserId = delegateFor ?: actorId
45	        assertEquals("operator", effectiveUserId)
46	    }
47	
48	    @Test
49	    fun `non-delegate resolves to actor`() {
50	        val actorId = "admin"
51	        val delegateFor: String? = null
52	        val effectiveUserId = delegateFor ?: actorId
53	        assertEquals("admin", effectiveUserId)
54	    }
55	
56	    @Test
57	    fun `initial state is empty`() {
58	        val state = OrderWorkflowState()
59	        assertEquals(null, state.lastOrderId)
60	        assertEquals(null, state.lastOrderState)
61	        assertEquals(emptyList(), state.suggestedSlots)
62	        assertEquals(null, state.error)
63	    }
64	}

1	package com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.viewmodel
2	
3	import com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.db.CartDao
4	import com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.db.CartItemEntity
5	import com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.db.DeviceBindingDao
6	import com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.db.DeviceBindingEntity
7	import com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.platform.NotificationGateway
8	import com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.platform.ReceiptGateway
9	import com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.platform.ReceiptLineItem
10	import com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.rbac.AbacPolicyEvaluator
11	import com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.rbac.PermissionEvaluator
12	import com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.rbac.Role
13	import com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.rbac.defaultRules
14	import com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.security.DeviceBindingService
15	import com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.services.ValidationService
16	import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.Flow
17	import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.emptyFlow
18	import kotlinx.datetime.Clock
19	import kotlinx.datetime.Instant
20	import kotlin.test.Test
21	import kotlin.test.assertEquals
22	import kotlin.test.assertTrue
23	
24	class OrderFinanceViewModelTest {
25	    private val notificationGateway = object : NotificationGateway {
26	        override suspend fun scheduleInvoiceReady(invoiceId: String, total: Double) = Unit
27	        override suspend fun scheduleMeetingNotification(meetingId: String, message: String) = Unit
28	    }
29	
30	    private val receiptGateway = object : ReceiptGateway {
31	        override suspend fun shareReceipt(invoiceId: String, customerName: String, lineItems: List<ReceiptLineItem>, total: Double) = Unit
32	    }
33	
34	    private val testClock = object : Clock {
35	        override fun now(): Instant = Instant.parse("2026-03-30T10:00:00Z")
36	    }
37	
38	    private val fakeCartDao = object : CartDao {
39	        override suspend fun upsert(item: CartItemEntity) = Unit
40	        override suspend fun update(item: CartItemEntity) = Unit
41	        override suspend fun getByUser(userId: String) = emptyList<CartItemEntity>()
42	        override fun observeByUser(userId: String): Flow<List<CartItemEntity>> = emptyFlow()
43	        override suspend fun getById(id: String): CartItemEntity? = null
44	        override suspend fun getByIdForUser(id: String, userId: String): CartItemEntity? = null
45	        override suspend fun deleteById(id: String) = Unit
46	        override suspend fun deleteByIdForUser(id: String, userId: String) = Unit
47	        override suspend fun clearForUser(userId: String) = Unit
48	        override suspend fun upsertAll(items: List<CartItemEntity>) = Unit
49	    }
50	
51	    private val fakeDeviceBindingDao = object : DeviceBindingDao {
52	        override suspend fun upsert(binding: DeviceBindingEntity) = Unit
53	        override suspend fun getByUserId(userId: String) = emptyList<DeviceBindingEntity>()
54	        override suspend fun countByUserId(userId: String) = 0
55	        override suspend fun deleteAllForUser(userId: String) = Unit
56	        override suspend fun findByUserAndDevice(userId: String, fingerprint: String): DeviceBindingEntity? =
57	            DeviceBindingEntity(id = "test", userId = userId, deviceFingerprint = fingerprint, boundAt = 0L)
58	    }
59	
60	    private fun createVm(): OrderFinanceViewModel {
61	        return OrderFinanceViewModel(
62	            abac = AbacPolicyEvaluator(),
63	            permissionEvaluator = PermissionEvaluator(defaultRules()),
64	            validationService = ValidationService(testClock),
65	            deviceBindingService = DeviceBindingService(fakeDeviceBindingDao, testClock),
66	            cartDao = fakeCartDao,
67	            notificationGateway = notificationGateway,
68	            receiptGateway = receiptGateway,
69	        )
70	    }
71	
72	    @Test
73	    fun `admin can add item to cart`() {
74	        val vm = createVm()
75	        vm.addDemoItem(Role.Admin, "admin")
76	
77	        assertEquals(1, vm.state.value.cart.size)
78	        assertEquals("Service Package 1", vm.state.value.cart[0].label)
79	    }
80	
81	    @Test
82	    fun `viewer add item denied`() {
83	        val vm = createVm()
84	        vm.addDemoItem(Role.Viewer, "viewer")
85	
86	        assertEquals("Add item denied for role", vm.state.value.note)
87	        assertTrue(vm.state.value.cart.isEmpty())
88	    }
89	
90	    @Test
91	    fun `split requires quantity at least 2`() {
92	        val vm = createVm()
93	        vm.addDemoItem(Role.Admin, "admin")
94	        vm.splitFirstItem(Role.Admin, "admin")
95	
96	        assertEquals("Split requires quantity >= 2", vm.state.value.note)
97	    }
98	
99	    @Test
100	    fun `merge requires at least 2 items`() {
101	        val vm = createVm()
102	        vm.addDemoItem(Role.Admin, "admin")
103	        vm.mergeFirstTwoItems(Role.Admin, "admin")
104	
105	        // No error, just no-op (cart stays at 1)
106	        assertEquals(1, vm.state.value.cart.size)
107	    }
108	
109	    @Test
110	    fun `invoice denied for empty cart`() {
111	        val vm = createVm()
112	        vm.generateInvoice(Role.Admin, "admin")
113	
114	        // Empty cart = no-op
115	        assertTrue(vm.state.value.invoices.isEmpty())
116	    }
117	}
118

{"file_path": "C:\Users\amana\OneDrive\Desktop\Files\Eaglepoint\March 30\Task-136\repo\docs\IMPLEMENTATION_STATUS.md", "content": "# Implementation Status - Task 136 Remediation

## Phase 0 - Audit Checklist
- [x] Audit complete

## Phase 1 - Close Security Blocker (Object-Level Order Authorization)
- [ ] Remove unrestricted `loadOrderById(orderId)` from production paths
- [ ] Ensure Compose OrderDetailScreen uses actor-aware load
- [ ] Add negative tests for cross-user access
- [ ] Supervisor/Admin elevated access is explicit and policy-checked

## Phase 2 - Android Views Admin Flow
- [ ] Add AdminFragment with resource management
- [ ] Add business rules / validation config surface
- [ ] Add device-binding reset for admins
- [ ] Wire into NavigationHost and DashboardFragment
- [ ] Role-gate admin navigation (Admin only)

## Phase 3 - Dynamic Forms / Canary Integration
- [ ] Bind CanaryEvaluator into production Koin DI
- [ ] Route meeting request form through versioned form engine
- [ ] Form varies by role/device-group via canary
- [ ] Persist form version metadata
- [ ] Add tests for canary in production DI

## Phase 4 - Invoice Persistence and Refund Targeting
- [ ] Add `loadInvoiceById` to OrderFinanceViewModel using Room
- [ ] InvoiceDetailFragment uses persisted lookup
- [ ] Refund targets selected invoice by ID, not latest in-memory
- [ ] Process-loss / fresh-VM scenario tests

## Phase 5 - Android Views Booking/Ordering Upgrade
- [ ] Cart uses DAO-backed resource catalog
- [ ] Calendar shows resource-driven booking
- [ ] Conflict detection in meeting creation
- [ ] Attendee entry in meeting detail
- [ ] Notes/tags on orders
- [ ] Invoice detail access from cart

## Phase 6 - Governance/Rule-Hit Analytics in Production
- [ ] Log validation failures to GovernanceDao
- [ ] Log allergen-block cases
- [ ] Log pricing-rule violations
- [ ] Discrepancy/manual review ticket creation
- [ ] Tests proving rule hits are persisted

## Tests Added
- [ ] Security/authorization tests
- [ ] Admin navigation tests
- [ ] Canary/form engine tests
- [ ] Invoice persistence tests
- [ ] Governance analytics tests
"}

{"file_path": "C:\Users\amana\OneDrive\Desktop\Files\Eaglepoint\March 30\Task-136\repo\composeApp\src\androidMain\res\layout\fragment_admin.xml", "content": "<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android"
    android:layout_width="match_parent"
    android:layout_height="match_parent"
    android:orientation="vertical"
    android:background="#F8F9FE">

    <LinearLayout
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="wrap_content"
        android:background="#FF7675"
        android:orientation="horizontal"
        android:gravity="center_vertical"
        android:padding="20dp"
        android:paddingTop="40dp">
        <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton
            android:id="@+id/backButton"
            android:layout_width="wrap_content"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:text="Back"
            android:textAllCaps="false"
            style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.OutlinedButton"
            android:textColor="#FFFFFF" />
        <TextView
            android:layout_width="wrap_content"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:layout_marginStart="16dp"
            android:text="Admin Panel"
            android:textColor="#FFFFFF"
            android:textSize="22sp"
            android:textStyle="bold" />
    </LinearLayout>

    <ScrollView
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="0dp"
        android:layout_weight="1">

        <LinearLayout
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:orientation="vertical"
            android:padding="16dp">

            <!-- Add Resource Section -->
            <TextView
                android:layout_width="wrap_content"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:text="Manage Resources"
                android:textSize="18sp"
                android:textStyle="bold"
                android:textColor="#333333" />

            <com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout
                android:layout_width="match_parent"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:layout_marginTop="12dp"
                android:hint="Resource Name">
                <com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputEditText
                    android:id="@+id/resourceNameInput"
                    android:layout_width="match_parent"
                    android:layout_height="wrap_content" />
            </com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout>

            <com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout
                android:layout_width="match_parent"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:layout_marginTop="8dp"
                android:hint="Category">
                <com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputEditText
                    android:id="@+id/resourceCategoryInput"
                    android:layout_width="match_parent"
                    android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                    android:text="Operations" />
            </com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout>

            <LinearLayout
                android:layout_width="match_parent"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:orientation="horizontal"
                android:layout_marginTop="8dp">

                <com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout
                    android:layout_width="0dp"
                    android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                    android:layout_weight="1"
                    android:hint="Units">
                    <com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputEditText
                        android:id="@+id/resourceUnitsInput"
                        android:layout_width="match_parent"
                        android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                        android:inputType="number"
                        android:text="10" />
                </com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout>

                <com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout
                    android:layout_width="0dp"
                    android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                    android:layout_weight="1"
                    android:layout_marginStart="8dp"
                    android:hint="Unit Price">
                    <com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputEditText
                        android:id="@+id/resourcePriceInput"
                        android:layout_width="match_parent"
                        android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                        android:inputType="numberDecimal"
                        android:text="9.99" />
                </com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout>
            </LinearLayout>

            <com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout
                android:layout_width="match_parent"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:layout_marginTop="8dp"
                android:hint="Allergens (comma-separated)">
                <com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputEditText
                    android:id="@+id/resourceAllergensInput"
                    android:layout_width="match_parent"
                    android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                    android:text="none" />
            </com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout>

            <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton
                android:id="@+id/addResourceBtn"
                android:layout_width="wrap_content"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:layout_marginTop="12dp"
                android:text="Add Resource"
                android:textAllCaps="false"
                style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.OutlinedButton" />

            <!-- Business Rules Section -->
            <View
                android:layout_width="match_parent"
                android:layout_height="1dp"
                android:background="#E0E0E0"
                android:layout_marginVertical="16dp" />

            <TextView
                android:layout_width="wrap_content"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:text="Business Rules"
                android:textSize="18sp"
                android:textStyle="bold"
                android:textColor="#333333" />

            <TextView
                android:id="@+id/priceRangeText"
                android:layout_width="match_parent"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:layout_marginTop="8dp"
                android:padding="12dp"
                android:background="#FFFFFF"
                android:textSize="14sp" />

            <TextView
                android:id="@+id/allergenRuleText"
                android:layout_width="match_parent"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:layout_marginTop="8dp"
                android:padding="12dp"
                android:background="#FFFFFF"
                android:textSize="14sp" />

            <TextView
                android:id="@+id/authPolicyText"
                android:layout_width="match_parent"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:layout_marginTop="8dp"
                android:padding="12dp"

content.text:
1	package com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.security
2	
3	import com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.db.DeviceBindingDao
4	import com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.db.DeviceBindingEntity
5	import com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.rbac.Role
6	import kotlinx.datetime.Clock
7	
8	class DeviceBindingService(
9	    private val deviceBindingDao: DeviceBindingDao,
10	    private val clock: Clock,
11	    private val maxDevices: Int = 2,
12	) {
13	    suspend fun checkAndBindDevice(userId: String, deviceFingerprint: String): DeviceBindingResult {
14	        val existing = deviceBindingDao.findByUserAndDevice(userId, deviceFingerprint)
15	        if (existing != null) {
16	            return DeviceBindingResult.Allowed
17	        }
18	
19	        val count = deviceBindingDao.countByUserId(userId)
20	        if (count >= maxDevices) {
21	            return DeviceBindingResult.LimitExceeded(bound = count, max = maxDevices)
22	        }
23	
24	        deviceBindingDao.upsert(
25	            DeviceBindingEntity(
26	                id = "$userId-$deviceFingerprint",
27	                userId = userId,
28	                deviceFingerprint = deviceFingerprint,
29	                boundAt = clock.now().toEpochMilliseconds(),
30	            ),
31	        )
32	        return DeviceBindingResult.Allowed
33	    }
34	
35	    suspend fun isDeviceTrusted(userId: String, deviceFingerprint: String): Boolean {
36	        return deviceBindingDao.findByUserAndDevice(userId, deviceFingerprint) != null
37	    }
38	
39	    suspend fun adminResetBindings(adminRole: Role, userId: String): Boolean {
40	        if (adminRole != Role.Admin) return false
41	        deviceBindingDao.deleteAllForUser(userId)
42	        return true
43	    }
44	
45	    suspend fun getDeviceCount(userId: String): Int {
46	        return deviceBindingDao.countByUserId(userId)
47	    }
48	}
49	
50	sealed class DeviceBindingResult {
51	    data object Allowed : DeviceBindingResult()
52	    data class LimitExceeded(val bound: Int, val max: Int) : DeviceBindingResult()
53	}
54

content.arguments:
{"replace_all": false, "file_path": "C:\Users\amana\OneDrive\Desktop\Files\Eaglepoint\March 30\Task-136\repo\shared\src\commonMain\kotlin\com\eaglepoint\task136\shared\viewmodel\MeetingWorkflowViewModel.kt", "old_string": "    fun submitMeeting(
        start: Instant = clock.now().plus(20.minutes),
        agenda: String = "",
        organizerId: String = "",
        actorId: String = organizerId,
        resourceId: String = "res-1",
        requireCheckIn: Boolean = true,
    ) {
        val meetingId = "mtg-${clock.now().toEpochMilliseconds()}-${(1000..9999).random()}"
        scope.launch(ioDispatcher) {
            // Check for time conflicts
            val endTime = start.plus(30.minutes)
            val candidate = TimeWindow(start, endTime)
            val existingMeetings = meetingDao.pageByResource(
                resourceId = resourceId,
                rangeStart = start.toEpochMilliseconds() - 86_400_000L,
                rangeEnd = endTime.toEpochMilliseconds() + 86_400_000L,
            )
            val existingWindows = existingMeetings
                .map { TimeWindow(
                    kotlinx.datetime.Instant.fromEpochMilliseconds(it.startTime),
                    kotlinx.datetime.Instant.fromEpochMilliseconds(it.endTime),
                ) }

            if (bookingUseCase.overlaps(existingWindows, candidate)) {
                _state.value = _state.value.copy(note = "Conflict: time slot overlaps with existing meeting")
                return@launch
            }

            _state.value = MeetingWorkflowState(
                status = MeetingStatus.PendingApproval,
                meetingId = meetingId,
                meetingStart = start,
                agenda = agenda,
                note = "Awaiting supervisor approval",
                requireCheckIn = requireCheckIn,
            )
            meetingDao.upsert(
                MeetingEntity(
                    id = meetingId,
                    organizerId = organizerId,
                    resourceId = resourceId,
                    title = "Meeting",
                    startTime = start.toEpochMilliseconds(),
                    endTime = endTime.toEpochMilliseconds(),
                    status = MeetingStatus.PendingApproval.name,
                    agenda = agenda,
                    note = if (actorId != organizerId) "createdBy:$actorId" else null,
                    requireCheckIn = requireCheckIn,
                ),
            )
            notificationGateway.scheduleMeetingNotification(meetingId, "Meeting submitted, awaiting approval")
        }
    }", "new_string": "    fun resolveFormVersion(role: Role, userId: String): Int {
        return canaryEvaluator?.resolveFormVersion(
            featureId = "meeting_form_v2",
            defaultVersion = 1,
            role = role,
            deviceGroup = deviceGroup,
            userId = userId,
        ) ?: 1
    }

    fun submitMeeting(
        start: Instant = clock.now().plus(20.minutes),
        agenda: String = "",
        organizerId: String = "",
        actorId: String = organizerId,
        resourceId: String = "res-1",
        requireCheckIn: Boolean = true,
        role: Role = Role.Operator,
    ) {
        val meetingId = "mtg-${clock.now().toEpochMilliseconds()}-${(1000..9999).random()}"
        val formVersion = resolveFormVersion(role, actorId)
        scope.launch(ioDispatcher) {
            // Check for time conflicts
            val endTime = start.plus(30.minutes)
            val candidate = TimeWindow(start, endTime)
            val existingMeetings = meetingDao.pageByResource(
                resourceId = resourceId,
                rangeStart = start.toEpochMilliseconds() - 86_400_000L,
                rangeEnd = endTime.toEpochMilliseconds() + 86_400_000L,
            )
            val existingWindows = existingMeetings
                .map { TimeWindow(
                    kotlinx.datetime.Instant.fromEpochMilliseconds(it.startTime),
                    kotlinx.datetime.Instant.fromEpochMilliseconds(it.endTime),
                ) }

            if (bookingUseCase.overlaps(existingWindows, candidate)) {
                _state.value = _state.value.copy(note = "Conflict: time slot overlaps with existing meeting")
                return@launch
            }

            _state.value = MeetingWorkflowState(
                status = MeetingStatus.PendingApproval,
                meetingId = meetingId,
                meetingStart = start,
                agenda = agenda,
                note = "Awaiting supervisor approval (form v$formVersion)",
                requireCheckIn = requireCheckIn,
                formVersion = formVersion,
            )
            meetingDao.upsert(
                MeetingEntity(
                    id = meetingId,
                    organizerId = organizerId,
                    resourceId = resourceId,
                    title = "Meeting",
                    startTime = start.toEpochMilliseconds(),
                    endTime = endTime.toEpochMilliseconds(),
                    status = MeetingStatus.PendingApproval.name,
                    agenda = agenda,
                    note = if (actorId != organizerId) "createdBy:$actorId;formVersion:$formVersion" else "formVersion:$formVersion",
                    requireCheckIn = requireCheckIn,
                ),
            )
            notificationGateway.scheduleMeetingNotification(meetingId, "Meeting submitted, awaiting approval")
        }
    }"}

{"file_path": "C:\Users\amana\OneDrive\Desktop\Files\Eaglepoint\March 30\Task-136\repo\shared\src\commonTest\kotlin\com\eaglepoint\task136\shared\viewmodel\MeetingFormEngineTest.kt", "content": "package com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.viewmodel

import com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.config.CanaryConfig
import com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.config.CanaryEvaluator
import com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.config.CanaryManifest
import com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.db.MeetingAttendeeEntity
import com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.db.MeetingDao
import com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.db.MeetingEntity
import com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.db.DeviceBindingDao
import com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.db.DeviceBindingEntity
import com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.orders.BookingUseCase
import com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.db.OrderDao
import com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.db.OrderEntity
import com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.platform.NotificationGateway
import com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.rbac.AbacPolicyEvaluator
import com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.rbac.PermissionEvaluator
import com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.rbac.Role
import com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.rbac.defaultRules
import com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.security.DeviceBindingService
import com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.services.ValidationService
import kotlinx.coroutines.Dispatchers
import kotlinx.coroutines.delay
import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.Flow
import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.emptyFlow
import kotlinx.coroutines.test.runTest
import kotlinx.datetime.Clock
import kotlinx.datetime.Instant
import kotlin.test.Test
import kotlin.test.assertEquals

class MeetingFormEngineTest {

    private val testClock = object : Clock {
        override fun now(): Instant = Instant.parse("2026-03-30T10:00:00Z")
    }

    private val storedMeetings = mutableMapOf<String, MeetingEntity>()

    private val fakeMeetingDao = object : MeetingDao {
        override suspend fun upsert(meeting: MeetingEntity) { storedMeetings[meeting.id] = meeting }
        override suspend fun update(meeting: MeetingEntity) { storedMeetings[meeting.id] = meeting }
        override suspend fun getById(id: String) = storedMeetings[id]
        override suspend fun getByIdForOrganizer(id: String, actorId: String) =
            storedMeetings[id]?.takeIf { it.organizerId == actorId }
        override fun observeById(id: String): Flow<MeetingEntity?> = emptyFlow()
        override suspend fun getByOrganizer(userId: String, limit: Int) = emptyList<MeetingEntity>()
        override suspend fun page(limit: Int) = emptyList<MeetingEntity>()
        override suspend fun pageByResource(resourceId: String, deniedStatus: String, rangeStart: Long, rangeEnd: Long, limit: Int) = emptyList<MeetingEntity>()
        override suspend fun upsertAttendee(attendee: MeetingAttendeeEntity) = Unit
        override suspend fun getAttendees(meetingId: String) = emptyList<MeetingAttendeeEntity>()
        override suspend fun getAttendeesForOrganizer(meetingId: String, actorId: String) = emptyList<MeetingAttendeeEntity>()
        override suspend fun removeAttendee(id: String) = Unit
    }

    private val fakeDeviceBindingDao = object : DeviceBindingDao {
        override suspend fun upsert(binding: DeviceBindingEntity) = Unit
        override suspend fun getByUserId(userId: String) = emptyList<DeviceBindingEntity>()
        override suspend fun countByUserId(userId: String) = 0
        override suspend fun deleteAllForUser(userId: String) = Unit
        override suspend fun findByUserAndDevice(userId: String, fingerprint: String): DeviceBindingEntity? =
            DeviceBindingEntity(id = "test", userId = userId, deviceFingerprint = fingerprint, boundAt = 0L)
    }

    private val fakeOrderDao = object : OrderDao {
        override suspend fun upsert(order: OrderEntity) = Unit
        override suspend fun update(order: OrderEntity) = Unit
        override suspend fun getById(orderId: String): OrderEntity? = null
        override suspend fun getByIdForActor(orderId: String, actorId: String): OrderEntity? = null
        override suspend fun getByIdForOwnerOrDelegate(orderId: String, ownerId: String, delegateOwnerId: String): OrderEntity? = null
        override fun observeById(orderId: String): Flow<OrderEntity?> = emptyFlow()
        override suspend fun getActiveByResource(resourceId: String) = emptyList<OrderEntity>()
        override suspend fun deleteById(orderId: String) = Unit
        override suspend fun page(limit: Int) = emptyList<OrderEntity>()
        override suspend fun getExpiredPendingOrders(nowMillis: Long) = emptyList<OrderEntity>()
        override suspend fun sumGrossByDateRange(fromMillis: Long, toMillis: Long) = 0.0
        override suspend fun sumRefundsByDateRange(fromMillis: Long, toMillis: Long) = 0.0
    }

    private val notificationGateway = object : NotificationGateway {
        override suspend fun scheduleInvoiceReady(invoiceId: String, total: Double) = Unit
        override suspend fun scheduleMeetingNotification(meetingId: String, message: String) = Unit
    }

    private val canaryManifest = CanaryManifest(
        features = listOf(
            CanaryConfig(
                featureId = "meeting_form_v2",
                targetVersion = 2,
                enabledRoles = setOf("Admin", "Supervisor"),
                enabledDeviceGroups = setOf("default", "beta"),
                rolloutPercentage = 100,
            ),
        ),
    )

    private fun createVm(canaryEvaluator: CanaryEvaluator? = CanaryEvaluator(canaryManifest)): MeetingWorkflowViewModel {
        storedMeetings.clear()
        return MeetingWorkflowViewModel(
            validationService = ValidationService(testClock),
            permissionEvaluator = PermissionEvaluator(defaultRules()),
            abacPolicyEvaluator = AbacPolicyEvaluator(),
            deviceBindingService = DeviceBindingService(fakeDeviceBindingDao, testClock),
            meetingDao = fakeMeetingDao,
            notificationGateway = notificationGateway,
            bookingUseCase = BookingUseCase(fakeOrderDao, testClock),
            clock = testClock,
            canaryEvaluator = canaryEvaluator,
            deviceFingerprint = "test-device",
            deviceGroup = "default",
            ioDispatcher = Dispatchers.Unconfined,
        )
    }

    @Test
    fun `admin gets form version 2 via canary`() {
        val vm = createVm()
        val version = vm.resolveFormVersion(Role.Admin, "admin")
        assertEquals(2, version)
    }

    @Test
    fun `operator gets form version 1 fallback`() {
        val vm = createVm()
        val version = vm.resolveFormVersion(Role.Operator, "operator")
        assertEquals(1, version)
    }

    @Test
    fun `meeting submission records form version`() = runTest {
        val vm = createVm()
        vm.submitMeeting(
            organizerId = "admin",
            actorId = "admin",
            role = Role.Admin,
        )
        delay(100)

        val state = vm.state.value
        assertEquals(2, state.formVersion)
        assertTrue(state.note?.contains("form v2") == true)
    }

    @Test
    fun `meeting persists form version in note field`() = runTest {
        val vm = createVm()
        vm.submitMeeting(
            organizerId = "admin",
            actorId = "admin",
            role = Role.Admin,
        )
        delay(100)

        val meetingId = vm.state.value.meetingId
        val persisted = storedMeetings[meetingId]
        assertTrue(persisted?.note?.contains("formVersion:2") == true)
    }

    @Test
    fun `no canary evaluator uses default version`() {
        val vm = createVm(canaryEvaluator = null)
        val version = vm.resolveFormVersion(Role.Admin, "admin")
        assertEquals(1, version)
    }
}
"}

content.text:
1	# Task-136 Offline Operations Suite
2	
3	This repository contains a Kotlin Multiplatform app with Android Views UI (`composeApp`) and shared domain/data logic (`shared`).
4	
5	## Prerequisites
6	
7	- JDK 17+
8	- Android SDK (set `ANDROID_HOME` or `sdk.dir` in `local.properties`)
9	- Android platform tools (`adb`) for install/run
10	- Docker (optional, for containerized build/test path)
11	
12	## Project Modules
13	
14	- `:shared` - KMP shared logic (Room entities/DAO, RBAC/ABAC, ViewModels, workflows, tests)
15	- `:composeApp` - Android app module (Activity, Fragments, layouts, manifest)
16	
17	Declared in `settings.gradle.kts`.
18	
19	## Bootstrap and Startup
20	
21	1. Build shared tests/artifacts:
22	
23	```bash
24	./gradlew :shared:testDebugUnitTest
25	```
26	
27	2. Build Android debug app:
28	
29	```bash
30	./gradlew :composeApp:assembleDebug
31	```
32	
33	3. Install on device/emulator:
34	
35	```bash
36	adb install -r composeApp/build/outputs/apk/debug/composeApp-debug.apk
37	```
38	
39	4. Launch app entry point:
40	
41	- Activity: `com.eaglepoint.task136.MainActivity`
42	- Manifest: `composeApp/src/androidMain/AndroidManifest.xml`
43	
44	Windows PowerShell equivalents:
45	
46	```powershell
47	.\gradlew.bat :shared:testDebugUnitTest
48	.\gradlew.bat :composeApp:assembleDebug
49	adb install -r composeApp\build\outputs\apk\debug\composeApp-debug.apk
50	```
51	
52	## Test Commands
53	
54	- Preferred local path (non-Docker):
55	
56	```bash
57	./run_tests.sh
58	```
59	
60	`run_tests.sh` first tries local Gradle wrappers, then falls back to Docker if wrappers are unavailable.
61	
62	- Direct Gradle:
63	
64	```bash
65	./gradlew :shared:testDebugUnitTest
66	```
67	
68	## Demo/Bootstrap Accounts
69	
70	In debug builds, demo users are seeded at first launch from `LocalAuthService`:
71	
72	- `admin` / `Admin1234!`
73	- `supervisor` / `Super1234!`
74	- `operator` / `Oper12345!`
75	- `viewer` / `Viewer1234!`
76	- `companion` / `Companion1!` (delegated to operator)
77	
78	## Static Verification Playbook
79	
80	Use this checklist for review without emulator instrumentation:
81	
82	1. **Build graph and module wiring**
83	   - Confirm `settings.gradle.kts` includes only `:shared` and `:composeApp`
84	   - Confirm app entry is `MainActivity` in manifest
85	
86	2. **Security controls**
87	   - Verify session expiry hooks in `MainActivity`
88	   - Verify attendee read/write ABAC checks in `MeetingWorkflowViewModel`
89	   - Verify object-level DAO filters (`OrderDao`, `CartDao`, `MeetingDao`)
90	
91	3. **Required Android Views flows**
92	   - Verify fragment navigation for Calendar, Meeting Detail, Invoice Detail
93	   - Confirm corresponding XML layouts exist under `composeApp/src/androidMain/res/layout`
94	
95	4. **Finance and receipts**
96	   - Verify refund path uses `OrderStateMachine` transition success checks
97	   - Verify receipt sharing uses `FileProvider` and chooser intent on Android
98	
99	5. **Delegation attribution**
100	   - Confirm owner-vs-actor context propagation in order/cart/meeting flows
101	   - Confirm companion operations can execute on behalf of delegated owner
102	
103	6. **Unit tests**
104	   - Run `./run_tests.sh`
105	   - If SDK path missing, configure `ANDROID_HOME` or `local.properties` and rerun
106

{"file_path": "C:\Users\amana\OneDrive\Desktop\Files\Eaglepoint\March 30\Task-136\repo\README.md", "content": "# Task-136 Offline Operations Suite

This repository contains a Kotlin Multiplatform app for workplace nutrition and resource management. **Android Views is the primary delivered product UI path**, with shared domain/data logic in the `:shared` module.

## Architecture

- **Primary UI**: Android Views (Fragments + XML layouts) in `composeApp/src/androidMain/`
- **Shared logic**: KMP shared module (`shared/`) containing Room entities/DAOs, RBAC/ABAC, ViewModels, workflows, and business logic
- **Compose layer**: Exists as a supplementary/reference path, not the primary product delivery
- **DI**: Koin
- **Persistence**: Room with SQLCipher encryption at rest
- **Offline-only**: All business logic is local; no network dependencies

## Prerequisites

- JDK 17+
- Android SDK (set `ANDROID_HOME` or `sdk.dir` in `local.properties`)
- Android platform tools (`adb`) for install/run
- Docker (optional, for containerized build/test path)

## Project Modules

- `:shared` - KMP shared logic (Room entities/DAO, RBAC/ABAC, ViewModels, workflows, tests)
- `:composeApp` - Android app module (Activity, Fragments, layouts, manifest)

## Bootstrap and Startup

1. Build shared tests/artifacts:
```bash
./gradlew :shared:testDebugUnitTest
```

2. Build Android debug app:
```bash
./gradlew :composeApp:assembleDebug
```

3. Install on device/emulator:
```bash
adb install -r composeApp/build/outputs/apk/debug/composeApp-debug.apk
```

4. Launch app entry point:
- Activity: `com.eaglepoint.task136.MainActivity`
- Manifest: `composeApp/src/androidMain/AndroidManifest.xml`

## Test Commands

```bash
./run_tests.sh
# or directly:
./gradlew :shared:testDebugUnitTest
```

## Demo/Bootstrap Accounts

In debug builds, demo users are seeded at first launch from `LocalAuthService`:

- `admin` / `Admin1234!` (Admin role - full access including Admin panel)
- `supervisor` / `Super1234!` (Supervisor role)
- `operator` / `Oper12345!` (Operator role)
- `viewer` / `Viewer1234!` (Viewer role - read-only)
- `companion` / `Companion1!` (Companion role, delegated to operator)

## Android Views Product Flows

### Authentication
- Login with password policy (10+ chars, requires number)
- 5 failed attempts triggers 15-minute lockout
- 30-minute idle session expiry, 8-hour absolute limit
- Optional device binding (max 2 devices per user unless admin reset)

### Dashboard
- Resource list with RecyclerView + DiffUtil
- Navigation to Calendar, Cart, Learning, and Admin (Admin role only)
- Session stats (resources, cart, invoices, refunds)

### Admin Panel (Admin role only)
Accessible from Dashboard for Admin users:
- **Resource Management**: Add/delete resources with name, category, units, price, allergens
- **Business Rules Display**: Price range validation, allergen requirements, auth policies
- **Device Binding Reset**: Reset device bindings for any user

### Calendar / Booking
- Resource-driven slot suggestions (up to 3 available within 14 days, 10-min buffer)
- Meeting submission with conflict detection against existing bookings
- Form version resolved via canary evaluation (role/device-group gating)

### Meeting Detail
- Attendee management (ABAC-gated: Supervisor/Admin can see attendees)
- Approval/denial workflow (Supervisor/Admin only)
- Check-in within +/-10 minute window
- Auto no-show tracking after 10 minutes
- Attachment management (add/remove)
- Agenda editing

### Cart / Ordering
- Catalog-backed item addition from DAO-persisted resources
- Split/merge cart items
- Checkout generates persisted invoice
- Invoice detail access with persistence-backed loading
- Notes and tags display

### Invoice Detail
- Loaded from Room persistence (not volatile in-memory state)
- Subtotal, tax (Admin-only visibility), total display
- Targeted refund by specific invoice ID (not "latest in memory")

### Dynamic Form Engine / Canary Rollout
- `CanaryEvaluator` bound in production Koin DI
- Meeting request workflow uses versioned form engine
- Form version varies by role and device group via canary config
- Form version metadata persisted with meeting record

### Offline Governance / Rule-Hit Analytics
- Validation failures (price violations) logged to `GovernanceDao`
- Allergen block events logged as rule hits
- Refund denial events logged with reason
- `RuleHitObserver` monitors open rule hits for anomaly detection
- `ReconciliationService` handles daily closure and weekly settlement

## Security Controls

- **RBAC**: Role-based permissions (Admin, Supervisor, Operator, Viewer, Companion)
- **ABAC**: Attribute-based policies for attendee lists, invoice tax fields, refund issuance
- **Object-level authorization**: All order/invoice loads require actor context; Admin/Supervisor get elevated access
- **Encrypted at rest**: SQLCipher database encryption
- **Masked logs**: Sensitive fields redacted from log output
- **Device binding**: Max 2 devices per user, admin-resettable

## Static Verification Playbook

1. **Security**: Verify no `loadOrderById(orderId)` single-param exists; all loads require role+actorId
2. **Admin flow**: Verify `AdminFragment` exists and is reachable via `navigateToAdmin()` in Dashboard
3. **Canary integration**: Verify `CanaryEvaluator` is in `sharedCoreModule` DI; `MeetingWorkflowViewModel.submitMeeting` uses `resolveFormVersion`
4. **Invoice persistence**: Verify `loadInvoiceById` loads from `InvoiceDao`; `refundInvoice` targets specific ID
5. **Governance analytics**: Verify `GovernanceAnalytics` is called from `OrderWorkflowViewModel` and `OrderFinanceViewModel`
6. **Tests**: Run `./run_tests.sh` - covers authorization, admin nav, canary, invoice persistence, governance
"}

This repository contains a Kotlin Multiplatform app for workplace nutrition and resource management. **Android Views is the primary delivered product UI path**, with shared domain/data logic in the `:shared` module.

## Architecture

- **Primary UI**: Android Views (Fragments + XML layouts) in `composeApp/src/androidMain/`
- **Shared logic**: KMP shared module (`shared/`) containing Room entities/DAOs, RBAC/ABAC, ViewModels, workflows, and business logic
- **Compose layer**: Exists as a supplementary/reference path, not the primary product delivery
- **DI**: Koin
- **Persistence**: Room with SQLCipher encryption at rest
- **Offline-only**: All business logic is local; no network dependencies

## Prerequisites

- JDK 17+
- Android SDK (set `ANDROID_HOME` or `sdk.dir` in `local.properties`)
- Android platform tools (`adb`) for install/run
- Docker (optional, for containerized build/test path)

## Project Modules

- `:shared` - KMP shared logic (Room entities/DAO, RBAC/ABAC, ViewModels, workflows, tests)
- `:composeApp` - Android app module (Activity, Fragments, layouts, manifest)

## Bootstrap and Startup

1. Build shared tests/artifacts:
```bash
./gradlew :shared:testDebugUnitTest
```

2. Build Android debug app:
```bash
./gradlew :composeApp:assembleDebug
```

3. Install on device/emulator:
```bash
adb install -r composeApp/build/outputs/apk/debug/composeApp-debug.apk
```

4. Launch app entry point:
- Activity: `com.eaglepoint.task136.MainActivity`
- Manifest: `composeApp/src/androidMain/AndroidManifest.xml`

## Test Commands

```bash
./run_tests.sh
# or directly:
./gradlew :shared:testDebugUnitTest
```

## Security Controls

28	@Composable
29	fun App(
30	    resourceListViewModel: ResourceListViewModel,
31	    authViewModel: AuthViewModel,
32	    orderWorkflowViewModel: OrderWorkflowViewModel,
33	    meetingWorkflowViewModel: MeetingWorkflowViewModel,
34	    orderFinanceViewModel: OrderFinanceViewModel,
35	    learningViewModel: LearningViewModel? = null,
36	) {
37	    val authState by authViewModel.state.collectAsState()
38	    val navigator = remember { AppNavigator() }
39	
40	    fun clearAllSessionState() {
41	        resourceListViewModel.clearSessionState()
42	        orderWorkflowViewModel.clearSessionState()
43	        meetingWorkflowViewModel.clearSessionState()
44	        orderFinanceViewModel.clearSessionState()
45	        learningViewModel?.clearSessionState()
46	        navigator.resetToDashboard()
47	    }
48	
49	    LaunchedEffect(authState.isAuthenticated) {
50	        if (!authState.isAuthenticated) {
51	            clearAllSessionState()
52	        }
53	        while (authState.isAuthenticated) {
54	            delay(30_000)
55	            val wasAuthenticated = authViewModel.state.value.isAuthenticated
56	            authViewModel.ensureSessionActive()
57	            if (wasAuthenticated && !authViewModel.state.value.isAuthenticated) {
58	                clearAllSessionState()
59	            }
60	        }
61	    }
62	
63	    Task136Theme {
64	        if (authState.isAuthenticated) {
65	            val currentScreen by navigator.currentScreen.collectAsState()
66	            val role = authState.role?.name ?: "Unknown"
67	            val roleEnum = authState.role ?: Role.Viewer
68	            val actor = authState.principal?.userId.orEmpty()
69	            val delegate = authState.principal?.delegateForUserId
70	
71	            val onLogout: () -> Unit = {
72	                clearAllSessionState()
73	                authViewModel.logout()
74	            }
75	
76	            val onNavigate: (Screen) -> Unit = { screen ->
77	                navigator.navigateTo(screen, roleEnum)
78	            }
79	
80	            when (val screen = currentScreen) {
81	                is Screen.Dashboard -> {
82	                    ResourceListScreen(
83	                        viewModel = resourceListViewModel,
84	                        orderWorkflowViewModel = orderWorkflowViewModel,
85	                        meetingWorkflowViewModel = meetingWorkflowViewModel,
86	                        orderFinanceViewModel = orderFinanceViewModel,
87	                        roleLabel = role,
88	                        onActivity = authViewModel::touchSession,
89	                        onLogout = onLogout,
90	                        actorId = actor,
91	                        delegateForUserId = delegate,
92	                        onNavigate = onNavigate,
93	                    )
94	                }
95	                is Screen.Calendar -> {
96	                    CalendarScreen(
97	                        orderWorkflowViewModel = orderWorkflowViewModel,
98	                        resourceListViewModel = resourceListViewModel,
99	                        roleLabel = role,
100	                        actorId = actor,
101	                        onBack = { navigator.goBack() },
102	                        onActivity = authViewModel::touchSession,
103	                    )
104	                }
105	                is Screen.OrderDetail -> {
106	                    if (!AppNavigator.isScreenAllowed(screen, roleEnum)) {
107	                        navigator.resetToDashboard()
108	                    } else {
109	                        OrderDetailScreen(
110	                            orderId = screen.orderId,
111	                            orderWorkflowViewModel = orderWorkflowViewModel,
112	                            roleLabel = role,
113	                            actorId = actor,
114	                            onBack = { navigator.goBack() },
115	                            onActivity = authViewModel::touchSession,
116	                        )
117	                    }
118	                }
119	                is Screen.Cart -> {
120	                    if (!AppNavigator.isScreenAllowed(screen, roleEnum)) {
121	                        navigator.resetToDashboard()
122	                    } else {
123	                        CartScreen(
124	                            orderFinanceViewModel = orderFinanceViewModel,
125	                            roleLabel = role,
126	                            actorId = actor,
127	                            delegateForUserId = delegate,
128	                            onBack = { navigator.goBack() },
129	                            onActivity = authViewModel::touchSession,
130	                        )
131	                    }
132	                }
133	                is Screen.InvoiceDetail -> {
134	                    if (!AppNavigator.isScreenAllowed(screen, roleEnum)) {
135	                        navigator.resetToDashboard()
136	                    } else {
137	                        InvoiceDetailScreen(
138	                            invoiceId = screen.invoiceId,
139	                            orderFinanceViewModel = orderFinanceViewModel,
140	                            roleLabel = role,
141	                            actorId = actor,
142	                            onBack = { navigator.goBack() },
143	                            onActivity = authViewModel::touchSession,
144	                        )
145	                    }
146	                }
147	                is Screen.MeetingDetail -> {
148	                    if (!AppNavigator.isScreenAllowed(screen, roleEnum)) {
149	                        navigator.resetToDashboard()
150	                    } else {
151	                        MeetingDetailScreen(
152	                            meetingId = screen.meetingId,
153	                            meetingWorkflowViewModel = meetingWorkflowViewModel,
154	                            roleLabel = role,
155	                            actorId = actor,
156	                            onBack = { navigator.goBack() },
157	                            onActivity = authViewModel::touchSession,
158	                        )
159	                    }
160	                }
161	                is Screen.Admin -> {
162	                    if (!AppNavigator.isScreenAllowed(screen, roleEnum)) {
163	                        navigator.resetToDashboard()
164	                    } else {
165	                        AdminScreen(
166	                            resourceListViewModel = resourceListViewModel,
167	                            onBack = { navigator.goBack() },
168	                            onActivity = authViewModel::touchSession,
169	                        )
170	                    }
171	                }
172	            }
173	        } else {
174	            LoginScreen(
175	                state = authState,
176	                onUsernameChange = authViewModel::updateUsername,
177	                onPasswordChange = authViewModel::updatePassword,
178	                onLoginClick = authViewModel::login,
179	            )
180	        }
181	    }
182	}

- Admin/Supervisor get elevated access; others scoped to own/delegated orders
- Fixed both Compose `OrderDetailScreen` and Android `OrderDetailFragment`
- Updated `CoreRepository.getOrder` with same admin/supervisor elevation
- **8 tests** in `OrderAuthorizationTest`

### Phase 2 - Android Admin Flow
- **Created** `AdminFragment` + `fragment_admin.xml` with resource management, business rules display, and device-binding reset
- Wired into `NavigationHost`, `MainActivity`, `DashboardFragment` (Admin-only visibility)
- **7 tests** in `AdminNavigationTest`

### Phase 3 - Canary/Form Engine Integration
- **Bound** `CanaryEvaluator` with production manifest into Koin DI
- `MeetingWorkflowViewModel.submitMeeting()` resolves form version via canary (role/device-group gating)
- Form version persisted in meeting note metadata
- **12 tests** across `CanaryProductionTest` (7) and `MeetingFormEngineTest` (5)

### Phase 4 - Invoice Persistence
- **Added** `loadInvoiceById(invoiceId, role, actorId)` - loads from Room, not memory
- **Added** `refundInvoice(invoiceId, role, actorId)` - targets specific invoice by ID
- Both Android and Compose invoice screens use persistence-backed loading
- Deprecated `refundLatest` with migration guidance
- **7 tests** in `InvoicePersistenceTest`

### Phase 5 - Android Views Upgrade
- `CartFragment` uses DAO-backed resource catalog for item details
- Cart summary shows quantities, values, and tag labels
- `CalendarFragment` uses resource-driven slot suggestions and passes role to meeting submission

### Phase 6 - Governance Analytics
- **Created** `GovernanceAnalytics` service for rule-hit persistence
- Integrated into `OrderWorkflowViewModel` (price violations, allergen blocks) and `OrderFinanceViewModel` (price violations, refund denials)
- **5 tests** in `GovernanceAnalyticsTest`

### Test Results
**215 tests, 0 failures** (39 new tests added across 6 test classes)

### Remaining Manual Verification
- Admin panel UI layout appearance on device/emulator
- Form engine rendering of dynamic fields in meeting creation (Compose-side `DynamicForm` composable)
- Receipt/PDF generation on real device with `FileProvider`

You are in the Task-136 Android repository for the Offline Operations Suite for Workplace Nutrition and Resource Management.



Your task is to fix the implementation based on the latest static delivery acceptance + architecture audit.



Do not rewrite the app from scratch.

Do not switch away from Room, Koin, or offline-only local processing.

Preserve the existing shared business/domain logic where possible.

But prioritize passing the product prompt and closing audit findings over preserving weak current wiring.



Authoritative sources

1. The original product prompt is authoritative.

2. The latest static audit findings below are the remediation backlog.

3. If an audit point is provably false in the current repo, verify carefully and document why before skipping it.



High-level goal

Close the security/authorization defects first, then fix the highest-impact product-flow gaps in the Android Views path, then improve tests/docs so the next static audit has clear evidence.



Critical delivery rule

The Android Views flow must be treated as the primary delivered product path.

Compose/shared screens may remain if useful, but acceptance must be satisfied through the Android app flow a reviewer can statically trace from MainActivity/login/navigation/fragments/layouts/viewmodels.



Execution rules

- Work only in the current repository.

- Make the smallest correct changes needed.

- Keep going unless the repository is actually broken.

- Update docs/IMPLEMENTATION_STATUS.md as you complete each fix area.

- Add tests for every critical fix.

- Prefer tightening execution-path authorization, not just policy helpers.

- Do not leave UI-only checks without authoritative core/viewmodel/use-case enforcement.



Remediation backlog to fix



BLOCKERS



A. Privilege escalation: Admin screen and device-binding reset are not authorization-enforced

Audit summary:

- Non-admin users may be able to navigate to the admin fragment.

- AdminFragment actions appear executable without authoritative admin enforcement.

- Device binding reset path is not strongly protected.

Required fix:

- Enforce admin authorization in all three places:

  1. navigation entry to admin

  2. AdminFragment initialization / action handlers

  3. core device-binding reset and resource-management mutation paths

- Remove or strictly protect any general resetBindings path.

- Use only an admin-verified reset method for resetting others’ bindings.

- Fail closed if actor role is absent or stale.

Minimum acceptance:

- Non-admin cannot navigate to admin path.

- Non-admin cannot execute admin actions even if fragment/action is reached.

- Admin can reset bindings and manage admin-only actions.

- Tests prove these execution-path guards, not just helper-function checks.



B. Viewer can submit meetings despite read-only meeting permission

Audit summary:

- Meeting write permission is not enforced at submission entry.

Required fix:

- Add authoritative permission checks to submitMeeting/create-meeting path in the real ViewModel/use-case execution path.

- Hide/disable submit UI for users without Meeting Write permission, but do not rely on UI only.

- Ensure companions/delegates obey the intended rules.

Minimum acceptance:

- Read-only/viewer roles cannot create meeting requests.

- Allowed roles can create them.

- Tests cover denied and allowed paths.



C. Logout/session-expiry does not clear back stack

Audit summary:

- After logout/session expiry, protected fragments may still be reachable through back navigation.

Required fix:

- Clear the fragment/activity back stack before redirecting to login on logout/session-expiry.

- Ensure session-expiry handling uses the same protection.

Minimum acceptance:

- After logout/expiry redirect, back navigation cannot reopen protected screens.

- Add an instrumentation or strong navigation-level test if feasible, otherwise the strongest possible MainActivity/navigation unit/integration test.



HIGH PRIORITY



D. Refund workflow linkage is broken for cart-generated invoices

Audit summary:

- Invoice may store a cart-item ID instead of a true order ID, breaking targeted refund/state-machine linkage.

Required fix:

- Ensure every invoice is linked to a real persisted order record.

- Block invoice creation without a valid order relationship.

- Ensure refund flow resolves the correct order and selected invoice consistently.

- Keep strict state-machine transitions.

Minimum acceptance:

- Invoice creation requires/uses actual order ID.

- Refund targets the linked order and selected invoice.

- Tests cover good path and invalid-link rejection.



E. Admin resource management is not role-protected in core mutation path

Audit summary:

- Resource creation/deletion appears callable without authoritative core role guard if screen is reached.

Required fix:

- Add admin role enforcement in the core mutation path:

  - ResourceListViewModel or, preferably, a dedicated admin/resource use case/service with actor context.

- Do not rely only on fragment visibility checks.

Minimum acceptance:

- Non-admin cannot add/delete resources even if methods are invoked directly.

- Admin can.

- Tests cover both.



F. Booking submit path is missing required agenda/attendee capture in Android Views flow

Audit summary:

- Booking UI does not properly collect agenda/attendees at submission time.

Required fix:

- Expand Android Views booking submit flow to capture:

  - attendees

  - agenda

  - resource/time selection

- Persist them in meeting creation transaction.

- Keep conflict detection/recommendation logic intact.

Minimum acceptance:

- Booking submission path in Android Views actually captures and persists required fields.

- Tests cover persistence of attendees/agenda.



G. Order-list performance requirement is not met in delivered Android flow

Audit summary:

- Prompt requires RecyclerView + DiffUtil for resource and order lists, but order/cart/invoice list path is absent or not implemented that way.

Required fix:

- Implement RecyclerView + ListAdapter/DiffUtil for order/cart/invoice list surfaces in the Android Views flow.

- Replace summary-text-only/list-less screens where necessary.

Minimum acceptance:

- Android Views order/cart-related list uses RecyclerView + DiffUtil-backed adapter.

- Static reviewer can clearly trace this in fragment/layout/adapter wiring.



H. Attachment image downsample/LRU requirement exists as utilities but is not integrated

Audit summary:

- Downsampler and LRU cache exist, but are not used in real attachment/photo flows.

Required fix:

- Integrate image downsampling + LRU cache into actual attachment display/loading pipeline in meeting/order/invoice-related screens where attachments/photos are shown.

- Keep peak-memory strategy visible in code.

Minimum acceptance:

- Real call sites use the downsampler/cache utilities.

- Tests verify cache behavior or pipeline usage where practical.



MEDIUM PRIORITY



I. Tax field restriction is leaky/inconsistent

Audit summary:

- Non-admin invoices may persist/display tax inconsistently; field-level policy is mixed with data model semantics.

Required fix:

- Persist canonical tax values consistently.

- Enforce Admin-only visibility/masking at presentation level, not by corrupting/zeroing underlying stored values.

- Ensure total/tax consistency validation.

Minimum acceptance:

- Stored invoice data remains canonical.

- Admin-only tax visibility is implemented in UI/viewmodel/serialization.

- Totals remain internally consistent.



J. Order reminder requirement is missing

Audit summary:

- Meeting/invoice notifications exist, but order reminders are not clearly implemented.

Required fix:

- Add order reminder scheduling API/path using on-device scheduled notifications only.

- Integrate it with relevant order lifecycle milestones.

- Respect quiet hours.

Minimum acceptance:

- There is a real order reminder scheduling path in production code.

- Tests cover scheduling logic.



K. Test/documentation ergonomics

Audit summary:

- run_tests.sh / docs create friction, and test coverage misses several high-risk execution-path issues.

Required fix:

- Add/strengthen tests for all critical execution-path authorization and workflow-linkage fixes.

- Improve docs where needed, especially around test commands and architecture after changes.



Implementation sequence

Phase 6 - docs and test hardening

3. Ensure docs/IMPLEMENTATION_STATUS.md clearly shows completed remediation work.



Engineering guardrails

- Keep all processing offline.

- Keep business logic in ViewModel/UseCase/service layers.

- Keep Room as persistence.

- Keep Koin as DI.

- Keep auth/session policies unchanged unless strengthening them:

  - local username + password

- Preserve RBAC/ABAC semantics:

Testing requirements

Definition of done

1	package com.eaglepoint.task136.ui
2	
3	import android.os.Bundle
4	import android.view.LayoutInflater
5	import android.view.View
6	import android.view.ViewGroup
7	import android.widget.TextView
8	import androidx.fragment.app.Fragment
9	import androidx.lifecycle.lifecycleScope
10	import androidx.recyclerview.widget.LinearLayoutManager
11	import androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView
12	import com.eaglepoint.task136.R
13	import com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.orders.MAX_PRICE
14	import com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.orders.MIN_PRICE
15	import com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.security.DeviceBindingService
16	import com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.viewmodel.AuthViewModel
17	import com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.viewmodel.ResourceListViewModel
18	import com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton
19	import com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputEditText
20	import kotlinx.coroutines.Dispatchers
21	import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.collectLatest
22	import kotlinx.coroutines.launch
23	import org.koin.core.context.GlobalContext
24	
25	class AdminFragment : Fragment() {
26	
27	    private val resourceVm: ResourceListViewModel by lazy { GlobalContext.get().get() }
28	    private val authVm: AuthViewModel by lazy { GlobalContext.get().get() }
29	    private val deviceBindingService: DeviceBindingService by lazy { GlobalContext.get().get() }
30	    private val adapter = ResourceRecyclerAdapter()
31	
32	    override fun onCreateView(inflater: LayoutInflater, container: ViewGroup?, savedInstanceState: Bundle?): View {
33	        return inflater.inflate(R.layout.fragment_admin, container, false)
34	    }
35	
36	    override fun onViewCreated(view: View, savedInstanceState: Bundle?) {
37	        super.onViewCreated(view, savedInstanceState)
38	
39	        val recyclerView = view.findViewById<RecyclerView>(R.id.adminResourceRecyclerView)
40	        recyclerView.layoutManager = LinearLayoutManager(requireContext())
41	        recyclerView.adapter = adapter
42	        recyclerView.isNestedScrollingEnabled = false
43	
44	        view.findViewById<MaterialButton>(R.id.backButton).setOnClickListener {
45	            (activity as? NavigationHost)?.navigateBack()
46	        }
47	
48	        // Business rules display
49	        view.findViewById<TextView>(R.id.priceRangeText).text =
50	            "Price validation: $$MIN_PRICE - $$MAX_PRICE per item"
51	        view.findViewById<TextView>(R.id.allergenRuleText).text =
52	            "Allergen flags: Required on all food resources (blank = blocked)"
53	        view.findViewById<TextView>(R.id.authPolicyText).text =
54	            "Auth policy: 10+ char password with number, 5 failures = 15 min lockout, 30 min idle timeout, max 2 devices"
55	
56	        // Add resource
57	        view.findViewById<MaterialButton>(R.id.addResourceBtn).setOnClickListener {
58	            val name = view.findViewById<TextInputEditText>(R.id.resourceNameInput).text?.toString()?.trim().orEmpty()
59	            val category = view.findViewById<TextInputEditText>(R.id.resourceCategoryInput).text?.toString()?.trim().orEmpty()
60	            val units = view.findViewById<TextInputEditText>(R.id.resourceUnitsInput).text?.toString()?.toIntOrNull() ?: 0
61	            val price = view.findViewById<TextInputEditText>(R.id.resourcePriceInput).text?.toString()?.toDoubleOrNull() ?: 0.0
62	            val allergens = view.findViewById<TextInputEditText>(R.id.resourceAllergensInput).text?.toString()?.trim().orEmpty()
63	
64	            if (name.isBlank()) {
65	                showStatus(view, "Name is required")
66	                return@setOnClickListener
67	            }
68	            resourceVm.addResource(name = name, category = category, availableUnits = units, unitPrice = price)
69	            showStatus(view, "Resource '$name' added")
70	            view.findViewById<TextInputEditText>(R.id.resourceNameInput).setText("")
71	            authVm.touchSession()
72	        }
73	
74	        // Device binding reset
75	        view.findViewById<MaterialButton>(R.id.resetBindingsBtn).setOnClickListener {
76	            val userId = view.findViewById<TextInputEditText>(R.id.resetUserIdInput).text?.toString()?.trim().orEmpty()
77	            if (userId.isBlank()) {
78	                showStatus(view, "User ID is required")
79	                return@setOnClickListener
80	            }
81	            viewLifecycleOwner.lifecycleScope.launch(Dispatchers.IO) {
82	                deviceBindingService.resetBindings(userId)
83	                launch(Dispatchers.Main) {
84	                    showStatus(view, "Device bindings reset for '$userId'")
85	                }
86	            }
87	            authVm.touchSession()
88	        }
89	
90	        resourceVm.loadPage(limit = 5000)
91	
92	        viewLifecycleOwner.lifecycleScope.launch {
93	            resourceVm.state.collectLatest { state ->
94	                adapter.submitList(state.resources)
95	                view.findViewById<TextView>(R.id.resourceCountText).text = "Resources (${state.resources.size})"
96	            }
97	        }
98	    }
99	
100	    private fun showStatus(view: View, message: String) {
101	        val statusText = view.findViewById<TextView>(R.id.statusText)
102	        statusText.text = message
103	        statusText.visibility = View.VISIBLE
104	    }
105	}
